title: Professor Emeritus John Ralph elected to National Academy of Sciences
summary_en: The honor recognizes his pioneering work to understand the biochemistry of an important binding compound in plants.
title_cn: Professor Emeritus John Ralph elected to National Academy of Sciences

title: Universities of Wisconsin Presidential Search Committee, interim president named
summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, President of the Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents, has appointed a 25-member Presidential Search Committee to help identify the next Universities of Wisconsin president. She appointed Renée Wachter as the Interim President of the Universities of Wisconsin.
title_cn: Universities of Wisconsin Presidential Search Committee, interim president named

title: A Camp Randall commencement
summary_en: Tears of joy, words of advice and some jumping around mark Saturday's ceremony.

title: ‘The world needs you’
summary_en: UW–Madison celebrated the achievements and expertise of doctoral and professional graduates at Friday’s spring commencement.
